title: DynamX Physics Mod
description: A Minecraft mod that aims to add realistic physics to Minecraft.
body:
DynamX is a Pack-Based mod that aims to add realistic physics to Minecraft. The mod uses the Bullet Physics Engine that can be found in many video games like GTA V and also in Blender.

DynamX allows you to create vehicles, cars and props with a large set of properties to fully customize your objects. You can also create items, blocks and armors, or spawn ragdolls.

Everything can be easily created with content packs. Thanks to DynamX's OBJ Model Loader, every object you create can be provided with very detailled OBJ models.

DynamX is also highly customizable with the possibility to create addons for the mod.

 

 

 

You can follow the progress of the mod by watching the devlogs we post on our YouTube channels :

 

Yanis : https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCtjiO2FR75JPJKg6YxKnPUA

Aym : https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCRK3UY9BhNRn-sL6JGGhqXA

 

Note that ACsGuis is required and automatically downloaded by DynamX when installing the mod.

 

The future is here with DynamX.

More information on our website https://dynamx.fr/

Discord : https://discord.gg/y53KGzD

**Donate on** [Donate - Paypal.me](https://www.paypal.com/paypalme/dynamxinc) (or [Donate - without paypal account](https://www.paypal.com/donate/?hosted_button_id=2EZMSXKD2URPA) if you don't have a paypal account). ## How to play Install Forge 1.12.2 and simply put the DynamX mod in your 'mods' directory. Since **DynamX doesn't provide any base vehicle or block**, you should also download at least one pack, like the BasicPack available on https://dynamx.fr/packs The base pack will allow you to have some vehicles, outfits and props to discover DynamX and play with ! To use it, simply place the file in the 'DynamX' folder, inside of your .minecraft directory. Models made by Dartcher, under copyright.
